mechanism: The field is described as if one explanatory mode replaces all others
possible_dampener: Represent history as layered and cumulative

mechanism: Contemporary methods are treated as inherently superior to older frameworks
possible_dampener: Show what earlier traditions still explain

mechanism: Experimental or neuroscientific methods are treated as the whole field
possible_dampener: Connect lab evidence to development culture institutions and action

mechanism: The field is treated as only a history of philosophical ideas
possible_dampener: Include empirical psychology social research and institutions

mechanism: Developmental history is reduced to Kohlbergian stage theory
possible_dampener: Include Piaget Gilligan social domain theory and contemporary development

mechanism: Moral judgment is reduced to rapid intuition and post hoc reasoning
possible_dampener: Include reflection development culture and institutional context

mechanism: Moral psychology is presented as culturally neutral
possible_dampener: Include pluralism politics religion marginalized voices and historical power

mechanism: Moral agency is treated as purely individual
possible_dampener: Model institutions organizations platforms bureaucracy and accountability systems

mechanism: Synthetic weights are mistaken for measured publication counts
possible_dampener: Label data as conceptual demonstration only

mechanism: History centers only famous canonical thinkers
possible_dampener: Use canonical figures while widening to care culture power and institutions
